sentences.target: このねこは茶色の毛がふわふわしている。
sentences.reading: このねこはちゃいろのけがふわふわしている。

translations.en: This cat has fluffy brown fur.
translations.es: Este gato tiene un pelaje marrón y esponjoso.
translations.fr: Ce chat a un pelage brun et duveteux.
translations.de: Diese Katze hat flauschiges braunes Fell.
translations.it: Questo gatto ha un pelo marrone soffice.
translations.ko: 이 고양이는 복슬복슬한 갈색 털을 가지고 있습니다.
translations.zh-Hans: 这只猫有蓬松的棕色毛发。
translations.yue: 呢隻貓有毛茸茸嘅啡色毛。
translations.ru: У этой кошки пушистая коричневая шерсть.
translations.pt: Esse gato tem pelo marrom fofo.
translations.he: לחתול הזה יש פרווה חומה פרוותית.
translations.vi: Con mèo này có bộ lông màu nâu mịn.
translations.ar: هذه القطة لها فراء بني كثيف.
translations.nl: Deze kat heeft pluizige bruine vacht.
translations.uk: У цього кота пухнасте коричневе хутро.
translations.hu: Ennek a macskának bolyhos barna szőre van.
translations.hi: इस बिल्ली के भुरे रंग के मुलायम फर हैं।
translations.pl: Ten kot ma puszyste, brązowe futro.
translations.el: Αυτή η γάτα έχει χνουδωτή καφέ γούνα.
translations.nb: Denne katten har fluffy brun pels.
translations.id: Kucing ini memiliki bulu coklat halus.
translations.sv: Den här katten har fluffig brun päls.
translations.ro: Această pisică are blană pufoasă, maro.
translations.cs: Tato kočka má huňatou hnědou srst.
translations.da: Denne kat har fluffy brun pels.
translations.fi: Tällä kissalla on pörröinen ruskea turkki.

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative adjective modifying 'cat' to indicate proximity to the speaker.
Noun meaning 'cat', the topic referent of the sentence.
Topic‐marking particle that marks 'this cat' as the topic.
Noun meaning 'brown', indicating the color attribute.
Genitive particle linking 'brown' to 'fur', indicating possession/attribute.
Noun meaning 'fur', which is the subject undergoing the action of fluffiness.
Subject‐marking particle that marks 'fur' as the grammatical subject of the verb.
Onomatopoeic word describing the fluffy texture of the fur.
Continuative form of the verb 'する', connecting the mimetic word to the auxiliary 'いる'.
Auxiliary verb indicating a continuous or resulting state (progressive aspect).

sentences.target: あのぼうしはふかい茶色でかっこいい。
sentences.reading: あのぼうしはふかいちゃいろでかっこいい。

translations.en: That hat is cool in a deep brown color.
translations.es: Ese sombrero es genial, de un color marrón oscuro.
translations.fr: Ce chapeau est cool dans une couleur marron profond.
translations.de: Dieser Hut ist cool in einem tiefbraunen Farbton.
translations.it: Quel cappello è bello, di un marrone intenso.
translations.zh-Hans: 那顶帽子很酷，颜色是深棕色的。
translations.ru: Эта шляпа очень стильная, глубокого коричневого цвета.
translations.pt: Esse chapéu é legal, numa cor marrom escura.
translations.he: הכובע הזה מגניב בצבע חום עמוק.
translations.tr: O şapka koyu kahverengi renkte havalı.
translations.vi: Chiếc mũ đó rất ngầu với màu nâu đậm.
translations.ar: تلك القبعة رائعة بلون بني داكن.
translations.nl: Die hoed is cool in een diepbruine kleur.
translations.uk: Той капелюх крутий, глибокого коричневого кольору.
translations.hu: Az a kalap menő, mélybarna színű.
translations.hi: वह टोपी गहरे भूरे रंग में कूल लगती है।
translations.pl: Ten kapelusz jest fajny w głębokim brązie.
translations.el: Αυτό το καπέλο είναι δροσερό σε βαθύ καφέ χρώμα.
translations.nb: Den hatten er kul i en dyp brun farge.
translations.id: Topi itu keren dengan warna coklat tua.
translations.sv: Den hatten är cool i en djupbrun färg.
translations.ro: Pălăria aceea e tare, într-o nuanță maro închis.
translations.cs: Ten klobouk je cool v tmavě hnědé barvě.
translations.da: Den hat er sej i en dybbrun farve.
translations.fi: Se hattu on viileä syvän ruskeassa.

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative adjective indicating something distant from the speaker.
Noun meaning 'hat', the topic referent of this sentence.
Topic‐marking particle that marks 'that hat' as the topic.
I‐adjective meaning 'deep', modifying 'brown' to describe color intensity.
Noun meaning 'brown', specifying the color of the hat.
Particle (te‐form of the copula) linking the noun predicate 'brown' to the following adjective.
I‐adjective meaning 'stylish' or 'cool', giving an evaluation of the hat.

sentences.target: 木の葉が秋に茶色に変わった。
sentences.reading: このはがあきにちゃいろにかわった。

translations.en: The leaves on the tree turned brown in autumn.
translations.es: Las hojas del árbol se volvieron marrones en otoño.
translations.fr: Les feuilles de l’arbre devenaient brunes en automne.
translations.de: Die Blätter am Baum wurden im Herbst braun.
translations.it: Le foglie dell'albero diventavano marroni in autunno.
translations.ko: 가을이 되면 나무의 잎이 갈색으로 변했습니다.
translations.zh-Hans: 树叶在秋天变成了棕色。
translations.ru: Листья на дереве становились коричневыми осенью.
translations.pt: As folhas da árvore ficaram marrons no outono.
translations.he: העלים על העץ הפכו לחומים בסתיו.
translations.vi: Những chiếc lá trên cây chuyển sang màu nâu vào mùa thu.
translations.ar: تحولت أوراق الشجرة إلى اللون البني في الخريف.
translations.nl: De bladeren aan de boom werden bruin in de herfst.
translations.uk: Листя на дереві восени ставало коричневим.
translations.hu: A fa levelei ősszel barnára váltak.
translations.hi: शरद ऋतु में पेड़ पर पत्ते भूरे रंग के हो गए।
translations.el: Τα φύλλα στο δέντρο έγιναν καφέ το φθινόπωρο.
translations.nb: Bladene på treet ble brune om høsten.
translations.id: Daun di pohon berubah menjadi coklat di musim gugur.
translations.sv: Bladen på trädet blev bruna på hösten.
translations.cs: Listy na stromě na podzim zhnědaly.
translations.da: Bladene på træet blev brune om efteråret.

tokens.explanation: Compound noun meaning 'tree leaves', the subject undergoing a color change.
Subject‐marking particle that marks 'tree leaves' as the grammatical subject.
Noun indicating 'autumn', the time when the change occurs.
Particle marking the time or context ('in autumn') of the action.
Noun indicating the resulting color state.
Particle indicating the target state in a change‐of‐state construction.
Past tense of the verb '変わる', indicating the change of color.

sentences.target: このチョコレートはこい茶色だね。
sentences.reading: このちょこれーとはこいちゃいろだね。

translations.en: This chocolate is a dark brown, isn’t it?
translations.fr: Ce chocolat est brun foncé, n’est-ce pas ?
translations.de: Diese Schokolade ist doch dunkelbraun, oder?
translations.it: Questo cioccolato è di un marrone scuro, vero?
translations.zh-Hans: 这巧克力是深棕色的，对吧？
translations.yue: 呢個朱古力係啡色嘅，係咪？
translations.ru: Этот шоколад тёмно-коричневый, не так ли?
translations.pt: Esse chocolate é marrom escuro, não é?
translations.tr: Bu çikolata koyu kahverengi, değil mi?
translations.vi: Sô cô la này có màu nâu sẫm, phải không?
translations.ar: هذه الشوكولاتة بنية داكنة، أليس كذلك؟
translations.uk: Цей шоколад темно-коричневий, чи не так?
translations.hi: यह चॉकलेट गहरे भूरे रंग की है, है ना?
translations.el: Αυτή η σοκολάτα είναι σκούρο καφέ, έτσι δεν είναι;
translations.nb: Denne sjokoladen er mørk brun, ikke sant?
translations.id: Cokelat ini berwarna coklat tua, bukan?
translations.sv: Den här chokladen är mörkbrun, eller hur?
translations.ro: Această ciocolată este de un maro închis, nu-i așa?
translations.cs: Ta čokoláda je tmavě hnědá, že?
translations.fi: Tämä suklaa on tummanruskea, eikö olekin?

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative adjective modifying 'chocolate' to indicate proximity.
Loanword noun meaning 'chocolate', the topic referent.
Topic‐marking particle that marks 'this chocolate' as the topic.
I‐adjective meaning 'dark', modifying 'brown' to describe saturation.
Noun meaning 'brown', indicating the color of the chocolate.
Plain copula asserting identity or property.
Sentence‐ending particle used to seek confirmation or agreement.
